notes: Captures the photo's distinctive dual-view (dorsal + lateral) composition in FAO style with clean single-weight ink and an almond eye on the lateral view, but fin shapes are distorted and arm/sucker detail is too simplified.
specific_issues: dorsal-view fins rendered as peaked triangular flaps instead of the photo's broad rounded rhomboid fins
arms reduced to thin tapered lobes with minimal individuation
sucker rings only sparsely indicated near arm bases, missing along most of the arm length
tentacular club expansions not differentiated from arm tips
dorsal-view eye barely indicated as a tiny ring rather than a clear almond with pupil
stipple clusters dense in mid-mantle rather than tracing the chromatophore distribution shown in the photo
fin-to-mantle junction line on dorsal view reads as a sharp angular shoulder rather than the smooth curve in the photo
small isolated stray dots near fin edges read as noise
